title: SettingsGetMethod
description: Contract for settings.get JSON-RPC method. App-boot query used to route /setup vs /skills and to populate the Settings screen.

SettingsGetRequest.title: SettingsGetRequest
SettingsGetRequest.description: Params for settings.get. Empty — no params needed.

SettingsGetActiveHost.title: SettingsGetActiveHost
SettingsGetActiveHost.description: Active Skill Host Folder details, present when an active host is configured

SettingsGetResponse.title: SettingsGetResponse
SettingsGetResponse.description: Current app settings. Errors: database_error (1004) if DB unavailable.

activeSkillHostFolderId.description: ID of the currently active skill_host_folders row, or null if none configured

defaultInstallMode.description: Default mechanism for installing skills into projects

activeHost.description: Populated active host detail, or null when no active host or host row missing
